# Transcrição: 07-Tutorial_ Adding Your Business Details to the Mastermind Business Hub

- **Fonte:** 07-Tutorial_ Adding Your Business Details to the Mastermind Business Hub
- **Duração:** 02:25
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 02:25]

Now that we have a deeper understanding of how to further legitimize your business, let's talk about how you can update your business profile on the Mastering Business Hub to reflect these new business credentials. We'll go ahead and walk you through that now by first navigating our Settings menu and then selecting Business Info. So as you may have seen from one of our account setup videos, if you don't yet have your business name fully registered, you would instead want to fill in your information here underneath your personal full name and personal address. But now that you have your business registered, we will want to update this. If you do have your business registered with an EIN number inside of the United States, you can go ahead and fill in that legal business name here. If you don't and you have it registered from outside of the US, I'll walk you through how you can add in your registration numbers below. If you don't have this, again, you'll go ahead and just put in your full legal name. Next let's scroll down to the next thing you'll want to update, which is your business information. Here you'll see that we have the opportunity to choose our business type, which in most cases is going to be the sole proprietorship, your business industry, which doesn't have to be exactly correct, but you'll want to choose something that is relevant to what you do. And then next our business registration ID type. So again, if you are registered in the US and have that EIN number, you'll go ahead and select this and fill in your registration number below. If you have it registered elsewhere outside of the United States, you can go ahead and fill in your information this way. Again, if you do not yet have it registered, you'll want to go ahead and select my business is not yet registered. Whenever we're updating this menu, we'll always want to select update information. So that way our changes have been saved. Next let's take a look at our business physical address. We'll want to update this as it appears in our EIN listing or wherever we have our business registered. If our business is not yet registered, we will simply want to put in our personal address. But since we've gone through that registration process, we'll go ahead and update that here and finally select update to make sure that those changes are saved. All right, there you have it. Now we have our business profile settings changed and we are ready to go.
